name: Credit Repair Miami: Buildworth Strategies LLC
description_short: Credit repair company offering personal and business credit repair services with a focus on rapid results, claiming 90-day credit goal achievement through dispute and removal strategies.
description_long: Build Worth Strategies LLC operates as a credit repair company serving the Miami area and broader US market. The company positions itself around the brand promise of helping consumers 'Meet Your Credit Goal in 90 days' and offers both personal and business credit repair services. According to their website, they provide comprehensive credit report evaluation, dispute services, and credit rebuilding strategies. The company emphasizes 24/7 customer support availability and free consultation services. Key team members mentioned include Annielly Marcano (Senior Credit Analyst), Justo (Owner/Strategist), and Pablo, among others. Build Worth Strategies distinguishes itself primarily through testimonials highlighting rapid results and personalized service. Multiple client reviews reference seeing improvements within 60-90 days and praise specific team members for responsiveness and professional conduct. The company claims to have helped clients remove collections, improve credit scores significantly, and move toward debt freedom. Client testimonials emphasize proactive communication, with one reviewer noting the analyst calls for updates rather than requiring clients to initiate contact. However, the website provides limited detail about their specific dispute methodologies, fee structures, legal compliance frameworks, or guarantees. No information is available regarding FCRA compliance documentation, state licensing, bonding status, or the company's approach to the FTC's restrictions on credit repair services. The testimonials, while positive, lack specificity about the types of items disputed or the actual outcomes achieved, making independent verification difficult.
address: 6625 Miami Lakes Dr Suite 310, Miami Lakes, FL 33014

pros: Claims 90-day credit goal achievement timeframe with documented client satisfaction
Offers both personal and business credit repair services under one provider
Free credit report evaluation and free consultation available to prospects
24/7 customer support availability emphasized on homepage
Multiple client testimonials cite rapid results within 60-90 days of service start
Proactive communication model with analysts initiating status updates
Serves Miami and broader US geographic markets per website content
cons: Website lacks transparency on fee structure, pricing models, or service costs
No published information on state licensing, bonding, or regulatory compliance credentials
Limited detail on specific dispute methodologies or FCRA compliance procedures
Testimonials lack specificity about item types disputed or quantifiable credit score improvements
No mention of written guarantees, money-back policies, or service outcome warranties
best_for: Miami-area consumers with negative items (collections, late payments) on credit reports seeking rapid remediation
Business owners needing to repair business credit profiles alongside personal credit
Consumers seeking personalized communication and proactive status updates throughout repair process
diagnosis: Build Worth Strategies is positioned for consumers in the Miami area seeking rapid credit repair with personalized service, particularly those with collections or significant negative items. The primary caveat is the lack of published regulatory credentials, fee transparency, and detailed methodological information on the website, which makes independent verification of claims and service legitimacy difficult before engagement.
services: Personal credit repair and credit score improvement
Proactive account management and status updates
